messages.content: Hello there! I'm your friendly AI Study Assistant for the Applied Machine Learning course at the University of Bologna. I'm here to support you by providing explanations, quizzes, and summaries from our course lecture materials. Feel free to ask me anything related to the class, and I'll be happy to assist you!
how many slides should i study for this course?

Based on the available course materials, there is no specific instruction on how many slides or chapters you should study. The focus is on understanding the concepts clearly rather than memorizing slide counts. 

The course recommends focusing on key concepts and topics covered in each lecture instead of a numerical target. It's essential to review the lecture notes, examples, and projects provided throughout the course.

To effectively prepare for exams and complete projects, familiarize yourself with all material within each module. This approach will ensure you have a comprehensive understanding of the subject matter, enabling success in your studies.
